Common.appName: Shri Veer Patta School Fee Admin
Common.school: Shri Veer Patta Senior Secondary School

workbookViews.transactionsDescription: Ab tak ki jama receipts — paid aur baaki ki current haalat ke saath.
workbookViews.collectionTodayDescription: Roz ki vasooli ka jod — daybook milaan ke liye.
workbookViews.receiptsDescription: Reprint, verify aur desk follow-up ke liye receipt register.
workbookViews.studentDuesDescription: Bachhe ke hisaab se baaki, jama, chhoot aur agli kist ki detail.
workbookViews.installmentsDescription: Bachhe ke hisaab se baaki kistein — agli date aur late fee ke saath.
workbookViews.classRegisterDescription: Class-wise register — total aur chhota payment history ke saath.
workbookViews.defaultersDescription: Overdue bachhe — phone follow-up ki info ke saath.
workbookViews.importIssuesDescription: Recent imports jinki office check baaki hai.
workbookViews.exportsDescription: Permanent finance views CSV mein download karein.

Defaulters.title: Bakaya anusaran soochi
Defaulters.description: {session} ke liye phone-ready bakaya soochi. Sabse adhik jokhim sabse upar.
Defaulters.officeNotice: Is screen ka upyog keval call aur anusaran ke liye karein. Bhugtan Bhugtan Counter se lein.
Defaulters.filtersDescription: Anusaran soochi ko office team ke liye sankshipt rakhein.
Defaulters.metricStudentsListedHint: Chayanit anusaran filtron se mel khaate vartman vidyarthi.
Defaulters.metricPendingAmountHint: Soochibaddh vidyarthiyon ka kul bakaya shesh.
Defaulters.metricOverdueInstallmentsHint: Deya tithi beetne ke baad bhi apradatt kistein. Neeche vilamb shulk alag dikhaaya gaya hai.
Defaulters.metricOpenInstallmentsHint: Soochibaddh panktiyon mein lambit, anshik, aur atideya kistein.
Defaulters.metricMissingDuesHint: Sakriya vidyarthi jinke bakaaye taiyaar kiye jaane hain, sachche bakayedaar nahin maane gaye.
Defaulters.missingDuesTitle: Vidyarthi jinke bakaaye taiyaar nahin hain
Defaulters.missingDuesDescription: Ye sakriya vidyarthi abhi bakayedaar nahin maane gaye. Vasooli ya anusaran se pehle bakaaye taiyaar karein.
Defaulters.listDescription: Bakaya rashi aur atideya dinon ke anusaar kram — sabse adhik jokhim pehle.
Defaulters.emptyDefaulters: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi bakayedaar nahin mila.
Defaulters.routeTransportDescription: Parivahan anusaran aur route-star milaan karya ke liye yeh drishya upyog karein.
Defaulters.routeTransportEmpty: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi route-vaar bakaya pankti nahin.
Defaulters.routeStudentListDescription: Office call aur atideya anusaran ke liye route-vaar vidyarthi soochi.
Defaulters.routeStudentListEmpty: Chayanit filtron ke liye koi route-vaar vidyarthi nahin.
Defaulters.quickNoAnswerAria: Jawab nahin — ek tap mein log karein
Defaulters.quickReachedAria: Baat hui — ek tap mein log karein
Defaulters.desktopPickStudent: Shuru karne ke liye student chunein
Defaulters.desktopPickHint: Bayein taraf kisi bhi row par click karke sampark log aur actions kholein.
Defaulters.popoverPromisedDateHint: Hum us tareekh par is student ko 'Jald' soochi mein dobara dikhayenge.
Defaulters.whatsappWillAutoLog: Bhejne par is student ke liye ek WhatsApp sampark prayas apne aap darj hoga.
Defaulters.whatsappAutoLogged: WhatsApp bhejna sampark log mein darj ho gaya.
Defaulters.feeLoading: Fees details load ho rahi hain…
Defaulters.feeLoadStatus: Fee breakdown load nahin ho saka ({status})
Defaulters.feeEmpty: Is student ke liye fees abhi taiyaar nahin hai.
Defaulters.feeTapInstallment: Vivran ke liye kisi bhi installment par tap karein
Defaulters.feeNoPayments: Is session mein abhi koi bhugtaan nahin.
Defaulters.chipEscalateTitle: {count} lagaataar uttar nahin — badhaane par vichaar karein.
Defaulters.popoverDescription: {name} ke liye sampark prayaas darj karein
Defaulters.popoverSnoozeHint: Yadi nirdharit kiya, to yeh vidyarthi "Is saptah" ya "Sthagit" tab mein chala jaayega.
Defaulters.popoverNotePlaceholder: Jaise 20 taarikh tak bhugtan karenge, kist vivran chaahiye…
Defaulters.logEmpty: Abhi tak koi sampark prayaas darj nahin kiya gaya.
Defaulters.logLoadStatus: Sampark log load nahin ho saka ({status})
Defaulters.voiceNoteUnsupported: Is browser mein audio recording samarthit nahin hai.
Defaulters.voiceNotePermissionDenied: Recording praarambh nahin ho saki (microphone anumati asveekrit?).
Defaulters.voiceNoteLoadFailed: Voice note load nahin ho saka.
Defaulters.voiceNoteLoadStatus: Voice note load nahin ho saka ({status})
Defaulters.whatsappDisclaimer: Is sandesh ko pratilipi karein aur WhatsApp mein paste karein. Yeh app sandesh nahin bhejta.
Defaulters.bulkSendButton: {count, plural, =1 {# abhibhavak} other {# abhibhavakon}} ko WhatsApp bhejein
Defaulters.bulkSheetTitle: {count, plural, =1 {# abhibhavak} other {# abhibhavakon}} ko WhatsApp
Defaulters.bulkSheetDescription: Ek praaroop chunein, poorvaavlokan dekhein, phir har abhibhavak ke liye ek WhatsApp praaroop kholein.
Defaulters.bulkNoTemplates: Koi sakriya praaroop nahin. Admin Tools → WhatsApp templates ke antargat ek banayein.
Defaulters.bulkNoPhoneMessage: {count, plural, =1 {# chayanit abhibhavak ke paas} other {# chayanit abhibhavakon ke paas}} phone number nahin hai aur chhod diye jaayenge:
Defaulters.bulkOpenInfo: Pushti karne par {count, plural, =1 {# naya browser tab} other {# naye browser tabs}} khulega, har abhibhavak ke liye ek. Sameeksha ke baad har ek ko manually bhejein.
Defaulters.bulkOpenButton: {count, plural, =1 {# WhatsApp tab} other {# WhatsApp tabs}} kholein

Exports.title: Export
Exports.description: Vidyarthi, bakaya, anusaran, aur raseedon ke liye Excel files download karein.
Exports.officeNotice: Mobile par, device settings ke anusaar download browser ya spreadsheet app mein khul sakte hain.
Exports.groupChooseHint: Office karya se mel khaane vali file chunein.
Exports.itemAllStudentsDetail: Office jaanch ke liye poorn vidyarthi soochi.
Exports.itemDiscountStudentsDetail: RTE, staff bachcha, aur bhai-behan neeti.
Exports.itemClassWiseDuesDetail: Kaksha kul aur lambit shulk sameeksha.
Exports.itemDefaultersDetail: Lambit aur atideya bakaya ke liye anusaran soochi.
Exports.itemReceiptRegisterDetail: Office khaaton ke liye saheje gaye raseed records.
Exports.itemAiContextBundleDetail: Vidyarthi, kistein, bhugtan, kakshayein, route, chhoot, bakayedaar aur README ke saath bahu-sheet workbook. Badi file — banaane mein 10–20 second lag sakte hain.

FeeSetup.title: Shaikshanik Varsh Shulk Vyavastha
FeeSetup.description: Varshik shulk, deya tithiyan, kaksha shulk, aur parivahan shulk nirdhaarit karein. Sahejne par bakaya svatah samanvayit hote hain.
FeeSetup.topbarSaveAria: Shulk Vyavastha sahejein aur bakaya samanvayit karein
FeeSetup.syncStatusSaving: Saheja va samanvayit kiya ja raha hai...
FeeSetup.permissionNotice: Keval admin Shulk Vyavastha badal sakte hain. Accountant aur keval-avlokan staff vartmaan aur saheji vyavastha yahan dekh sakte hain.
FeeSetup.unsavedNoticePrefix: Aapke paas asahej parivartan hain. Shirsh patti mein
FeeSetup.unsavedNoticeSuffix: click karein taaki bakaya lagu aur samanvayit hon.
FeeSetup.savingInfoNotice: Sahejne par bhavishya ya apradatt bakaya svatah update ho jaate hain. Chukaee ya samaayojit panktiyan sameeksha ke liye surakshit rehti hain.
FeeSetup.academicYearDescription: Is Shulk Vyavastha ke liye varsh chunein.
FeeSetup.testSessionNotice: Yeh ek test shaikshanik varsh hai. Test records mein vaastvik vidyarthi ya vaastvik bhugtan na milaayein.
FeeSetup.advancedYearDescription: Puraane varsh ka rakhrakhav aur saheji vyavastha ka vivran.
FeeSetup.savedSetupFeeHeads: {count, plural, =1 {# shulk mad} other {# shulk mad}}
FeeSetup.noSavedSetupYet: Abhi tak koi saheji vyavastha nahin
FeeSetup.basicDescription: Kist tithiyan, vilamb shulk, aur naye tatha vartmaan vidyarthiyon ke liye varshik shaikshanik shulk nirdhaarit karein.
FeeSetup.installmentDatesDescription: Yeh tithiyan is shaikshanik varsh ki shulk anusoochi nirdhaarit karti hain.
FeeSetup.annualRulesDescription: Bakaya taiyaar karte samay upyog ki jaane vali default varshik raashiyan.
FeeSetup.academicFeeDistributionDescription: Chunein ki varshik shaikshanik shulk kiston mein kaise phailaaya jaaye. Maujooda kist panktiyan is setting se nahin badaltin — yeh naye punarsrijan aur kisi bhi bhavishya ki Shulk Vyavastha par lagu hoti hai.
FeeSetup.firstOnlyOptionDescription: Poora shaikshanik shulk kist 1 mein jodein. Kist 2–N mein keval tuition / parivahan ka hissa hoga. Anushansit — vartmaan school abhyas se mel khaata hai.
FeeSetup.equalOptionTitle: Sabhi kiston mein samaan roop se vibhaajit
FeeSetup.equalOptionDescription: Varshik shaikshanik shulk ko har kist mein samaan roop se vibhaajit karein. Jab abhibhavak samaan bhugtan anusoochi chahein tab iska upyog karein.
FeeSetup.discountsDescription: Manak school chhoot neetiyan configure karein. Vidyarthi assignment Vidyarthi anubhag mein rehta hai.
FeeSetup.discountsInnerDescription: Manak school neetiyan configure karein. Vidyarthi-vishisht anumodan Vidyarthi anubhag se hota hai.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsDescription: Chayanit shaikshanik varsh ke saath saheje gaye atirikta shulk mad dekhein.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsAdvisory: Adhikaansh schools ko saamaanya varshik Shulk Vyavastha mein iski aavashyakta nahin hoti. AY 2026-27 ki shulk ganana ab bhi tuition, parivahan, shaikshanik shulk, aur signed anya samaayojan ka upyog karti hai.
FeeSetup.noFeeHeads: Is satr ke liye abhi tak koi atirikta shulk mad configure nahin kiya gaya hai.
FeeSetup.classesDescription: Har kaksha ke liye varshik tuition shulk darj karein.
FeeSetup.noClassesFound: Koi kaksha nahin mili. School Soochi ya pehli baar Setup se kakshayein jodein.
FeeSetup.advancedClassDescription: Kaksha soochi, sthiti, aur aprayukt panktiyan prabandhit karein.
FeeSetup.tuitionWillSync: Tuition svatah saheji va samanvayit hogi.
FeeSetup.transportDescription: Har route ke liye varshik parivahan shulk darj karein. Yadi school route shulk ka upyog nahin kar raha hai to parivahan khaali chhod dein.
FeeSetup.noRoutesFound: Koi parivahan route nahin mila. School Soochi se route jodein, ya yadi upyog nahin kiya ja raha hai to parivahan khaali chhodein.
FeeSetup.advancedRouteDescription: Route naam, route code, sthiti, aur aprayukt route prabandhit karein.
FeeSetup.routeFeeWillSync: Route shulk svatah saheja va samanvayit hoga.
FeeSetup.generateDescription: Vartmaan Shulk Vyavastha ko sabhi apradatt aur bhavishya ke bakaya par lagu karein. Maujooda bhugtan vali panktiyan surakshit rehti hain.
FeeSetup.generateRecentDescription: Haal ki sameeksha aur saheje gaye runs tab bhi dikhte hain jab naya bakaya update avruddh ho.
FeeSetup.generateRowsRecalculated: {count} panktiyan punah ganana ki gayin. Poorv bhugtan vali panktiyan surakshit raheen.
FeeSetup.generateReasonPlaceholder: Bataayein ki bakaya kyon update kiye ja rahe hain, jaise shulk parivartan ya sanshodhit kist tithiyan.
FeeSetup.generateReasonHelp: Yeh kaaran audit record ke saath saheja jaata hai.
FeeSetup.generateIdlePrompt: Vartmaan Shulk Vyavastha ko sabhi apradatt aur bhavishya ke bakaya par lagu karne ke liye kaaran darj karein aur bakaya update karein.
FeeSetup.generateFootnote: Bhugtan, raseedein, aur bhugtan samaayojan keval jodne yogya rehte hain. Yeh workflow keval bhavishya ya apradatt panktiyon ki punah ganana karta hai aur chukaee itihaas ko yathavat chhod deta hai.
FeeSetup.timeTravelDescription: Kisi chuni taareekh tak ki sakriya shulk neeti aur prati-kaksha shulk ka punarnirmit drishya. Keval padhne yogya; audit_logs se liya gaya.
FeeSetup.timeTravelChooseDescription: Jis din ka nireekshan karna ho use chunein. Prishth audit_logs se neeti snapshot punarnirmit karta hai.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyDescription: Chuni taareekh tak ya usse pehle ki navintam sakriya fee_policy_configs pankti.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyEmpty: Is taareekh tak ya usse pehle koi fee_policy_configs record sakriya nahin tha.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesDescription: Chuni taareekh tak ya usse pehle prati kaksha navintam sakriya fee_settings pankti.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesEmpty: Is taareekh tak koi kaksha shulk pankti sakriya nahin thi.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesDescription: Prati vidyarthi navintam sakriya student_fee_overrides. {count} mein se pehle 20 dikhaaye gaye.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesEmpty: Is taareekh par koi sakriya vidyarthi override nahin.
FeeSetup.timeTravelFootnote: {date} tak ya usse pehle {policyCount} neeti audit panktiyan · {feeSettingCount} fee_settings panktiyan · {overrideCount} override panktiyan nireekshit.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Aaj ki vasooli, baaki aur follow-up — ek nazar mein.
Dashboard.receiptsPosted: {count, plural, =1 {Aaj # receipt kati} other {Aaj # receipts katin}}
Dashboard.fullSessionDue: Poora session baaki — {count, plural, =1 {# bachha} other {# bachhe}}
Dashboard.installmentPulseBody: Is session mein {count, plural, =1 {# bachhe} other {# bachhon}} par baaki.
Dashboard.criticalAlertBody: Kuch fees data load nahi ho paya. Numbers adhoore ho sakte hain.
Dashboard.noStudentsBody: Pehle bachhon ke records add karein, fir vasooli se pehle Fee Setup dekh lo.
Dashboard.feeRecordsAttentionBody: Payment Desk ya dashboard data sahi response nahi de raha. Admin Tools → Fee Data Troubleshooting kholo.
Dashboard.preparedNotice: {count, plural, =1 {# bachhe} other {# bachhon}} ke baaki update kiye.
Dashboard.alertNoStudentsBody: Vasooli ke totals dekhne se pehle bachhe add ya upload karein.
Dashboard.alertNoReceiptsBody: Payment Desk par payment darj hone ke baad Today aur trend wale sections bhar jayenge.
Dashboard.alertsEmptyTitle: Koi dhyan dene wala kaam nahi
Dashboard.alertsEmptyBody: Abhi setup, import ya baaki-update se judi koi problem nahi hai.
Dashboard.duesUpdateStartedBody: {count, plural, =1 {# bachhe} other {# bachhon}} ke baaki taiyaar ho rahe hain. Thodi der mein refresh karein.
Dashboard.emptyOpenFeeSetupDetail: Vasooli se pehle yearly fees dekho.
Dashboard.noClassFeePosition: Abhi class-wise fees position available nahi.
Dashboard.collectionFunnelDescription: Session ki kul baaki rashi; overdue mein late fee shaamil nahi.
Dashboard.studentStatusRingDescription: Is session mein active vs leavers.
Dashboard.classLeaderboardDescription: Vasooli rate ke order mein. Red par dhyan chahiye.
Dashboard.collectionHeatmapDescription: Day-wise receipt activity. Purane months ke liye arrows ka use karein.
Dashboard.classProgressDescription: Sabse peeche rehne wali classes pehle.
Dashboard.routeProgressDescription: Sabse zyada baaki wale transport routes pehle.
Dashboard.classFeePositionDescription: Sabse zyada baaki wali classes pehle.
Dashboard.morningBriefAllClear: Sabhi installments on track — aaj kuch bhi chase karne ko baaki nahi.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpOverdue: {label} overdue hai — {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} se {amount} ka follow-up karein.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpDueToday: {label} ki date aaj hai — {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} se {amount} ka follow-up karein.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpInstallment: {label} ({dueDate} tak) se pehle {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} se {amount} ka follow-up karein.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUp: {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} se {amount} pending ka follow-up karein.

Payments.title: Payment Desk
Payments.description: Bachha chuno, baaki dekho, payment lo aur receipt print karo.
Payments.loadingAria: Payment Desk load ho raha hai
Payments.offlineBody: Type karte raho — aapka draft is device par save hai. Confirm se pehle internet wapas aane do; confirm dabane par hi payment darj hoga.
Payments.recoveredBody: Draft safe hai. Rakam check karo aur ready ho to confirm karo.
Payments.duplicateTitle: Milta-julta payment pehle se darj hai
Payments.waiveSheetDescription: Baaki late fee: {amount}. Ye bachhe ke fee override mein likha jayega; agli receipt mein kam balance dikhega.
Payments.waivePreviousTotal: Is bachhe par pehle se di gayi alag maafiyaan:
Payments.waiveAmountHint: Maujooda baaki late fee tak hi ({amount}).
Payments.waiveReasonPlaceholder: Jaise family emergency, principal ki manzoori, etc.
Payments.waiveReasonHint: Kam se kam 4 akshar. Kaaran bachhe ke fee-override audit mein jud jayega.
Payments.waiveStandaloneCaption: Alag maafi (fee override mein likhi jaati hai, audit hoti hai):
Payments.blockingReasonReadOnlyDetail: Desk dekh sakte ho, par payment darj nahi kar sakte.
Payments.blockingReasonNoPolicyTitle: Is session ke liye Fee Setup adhoora hai.
Payments.blockingReasonNoPolicyDetail: Payment lene se pehle Fee Setup kholo aur session ki policy publish karo.
Payments.blockingReasonNoClassTitle: Is session mein koi class active nahi.
Payments.blockingReasonNoClassDetail: Master Data kholo aur is session ke liye kam se kam ek class active karo.
Payments.blockingReasonNoStudentTitle: Chuna hua bachha load nahi ho paya.
Payments.blockingReasonNoStudentDetail: Payment Desk refresh karo aur bachhe ko dobara chuno.
Payments.blockingReasonInactiveStudentDetail: Ye bachha active nahi hai, isliye naye baaki nahi bane.
Payments.blockingReasonSessionMismatchTitle: Chuna hua bachha kisi aur session ka hai.
Payments.blockingReasonSessionMismatchDetail: Ye bachha {studentSession} mein hai, par Fee Setup {policySession} ke liye active hai.
Payments.blockingReasonReviewNeededTitle: Fees records admin review chahte hain.
Payments.blockingReasonReviewNeededDetail: Baaki records maujood hain, par Payment Desk load nahi kar paya. Admin se kaho ki payment se pehle Fee Data Status chalayein.
Payments.blockingReasonPrepareFailedDetailFallbac: Is class/session ke liye Fee Setup adhoora hai. Class fee amount, installment dates aur active session check karo.
Payments.blockingReasonNotPreparedTitle: Is bachhe ke baaki abhi taiyaar nahi hue.

Students.title: Bachhe
Students.description: Bachhe add karo, khojo, ek saath update karo aur fee exceptions ki review karo.
Students.sessionMismatchDescription: Fee Setup aur bachhon ki list ek hi session par nahi hain.
Students.sessionMismatchBodyPrefix: Finance workflows Fee Setup session par default kar rahe hain
Students.loadWarningDescription: Kuch bachhon ka data safely load nahi ho paya. Page abhi bhi use kar sakte ho.
Students.filterLoadWarning: Bachhon ke filters safely load nahi ho paye: {error}
Students.filterLoadWarningFallback: Bachhon ke filters safely load nahi ho paye.
Students.studentLoadWarning: Bachhe safely load nahi ho paye: {error}
Students.studentLoadWarningFallback: Bachhe safely load nahi ho paye.
Students.searchPlaceholder: Bachhe ka naam, SR no. ya phone
Students.findStudentsDescription: Naam, SR no. ya phone se khojo; fir class, route ya status se filter karo.
Students.pendingSrNotice: {count, plural, =1 {# bachhe ka} other {# bachhon ke}} temporary SR numbers hain — fees lene se pehle permanent SR numbers daalo.
Students.studentLoadError: Is filter par bachhe load nahi ho paye. Filters clear karo ya doosri class chuno.
Students.emptyFiltered: Chune hue filters par koi record nahi. Filters clear karo ya search badhao.
Students.emptyFresh: Is session ka pehla bachha add karke shuru karo.

Transactions.loadingTitle: Finance records load ho rahe hain
Transactions.loadingDescription: Chuni hui view ke liye receipts, baaki aur export data laaya ja raha hai.
Transactions.title: Transactions
Transactions.description: Read-only: receipts, baaki, class register aur payment history.
Transactions.trustBadgeBody: Append-only · receipt par click karo audit dekhne ke liye
Transactions.unknownViewBody: Unknown view ''{value}'' — default view dikha rahe hain.
Transactions.viewFilterDescription: View turant badlo. Filters page reload kiye bina lagte hain.
Transactions.filterSearchPlaceholder: Bachha, SR no., receipt no., phone…
Transactions.summaryClassDescription: Chuni hui class ya view ke liye mukhya totals.
Transactions.summaryWorkingDescription: Zaroori totals pehle, baaki zaroorat par.
Transactions.tableEmpty: Is view mein koi transaction nahi.
Transactions.receiptsDescriptionShort: Print, bachha aur Payment Desk shortcuts ke saath receipt register.
Transactions.duesTrackerDescription: Bachhe-wise baaki tracker — baaki kistein aur agli date ki detail ke saath.
Transactions.studentDuesDescription: Bachhe-wise baaki, jama, pending, chhoot aur agli date ki info.
Transactions.classRegisterDescription: Class register — baaki status, jama, pending aur actions.
Transactions.defaultersDescription: Sirf overdue bachhe — phone follow-up ki info ke saath.
Transactions.collectionTodayDescription: Desk aur daybook milaan ke liye din ki vasooli ke totals.
Transactions.importIssuesDescription: Recent staged rows jinhe review ya cleanup chahiye.
Transactions.exportsSectionBodySuffix: tab in the sidebar to download finance data as CSV.

Receipts.indexDescription: Receipt dhoondho aur printable copy kholo.
Receipts.lookupDescription: Receipt number ya reference number se khojo.
Receipts.recentCount: {count, plural, =1 {Is list mein # receipt} other {Is list mein # receipts}}.
Receipts.emptyMobile: Is filter mein koi receipt nahi mili.
Receipts.tableEmpty: Is filter mein koi receipt nahi mili.
Receipts.detailDescription: Office record aur reprint ke liye print-ready receipt.
Receipts.previewSheetDescription: Quick preview. Print ya share ke liye poora page kholo.
Receipts.shareSheetDescription: Message dekh lo, fir WhatsApp ya email se bhejo.
Receipts.shareMailNote: Mail client PDF khud nahi jodega. Pehle print dialog se receipt ko PDF mein save karo, fir bhejne se pehle attach karo.
Receipts.conventionalDiscountTagline: Is session par sirf tuition-fee policy lagu.
Receipts.otherAssignedPolicies: Aur lagu policies (sirf audit ke liye):
Receipts.supersededPolicyItem: {name} ({code}) — upar wali kam-tuition policy priority se lagu; is receipt mein extra bachat nahi.
Receipts.officialReceiptStatement: This is an official school fee receipt.
Receipts.keepRecordsStatement: Please keep this receipt for your records.
Receipts.v2FeeDetailHint: Conventional discount and full fee breakup. Visible on screen for staff; not printed.

AdminTools.title: Admin Tools
AdminTools.description: Setup and staff tools. Routine dues sync runs automatically from Students and Fee Setup.
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedTitle: Automatic sync just updated this session
AdminTools.noticeHealthUnavailableBody: Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. {error}
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedBody: {session} was reconciled automatically. Continue normal work in Students, Fee Setup, Payment Desk, and Transactions.
AdminTools.noticeAutoOnBody: The app prepares dues after student changes, imports, Fee Setup changes, and selected-student Payment Desk loading. Admin Tools is now only for review and rare setup tasks.
AdminTools.syncReasonAutoUnavailable: Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.syncReasonHealthFailed: Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.sessionStatusDescription: This shows whether the selected year is ready for Dashboard, Payment Desk, Transactions, and Defaulters.
AdminTools.qualityDescription: Read-only guardrails for offline fallback, visual checks, and workflow speed targets.
AdminTools.qualityOfflineDetail: Payments and receipts still require server confirmation.
AdminTools.qualityWorkflowDetail: Search-to-student selection budget for counter work.
AdminTools.qualityVisualDetail: Dashboard, Payment Desk, Students, Reports, and Admin Tools in TEST session.
AdminTools.activityDescription: Recent staff actions across the workspace. Read-only audit trail for the day-to-day.
AdminTools.activityRecentDescription: Most recent 100 events first. Older events drop off the feed but remain in the table.
AdminTools.promotionDescription: Build a per-student preview that proposes next-year classes (Class 8 → Class 9, etc.), apply it once verified, and roll back if needed.
AdminTools.promotionStartDescription: Sessions follow the format 2026-27 / 2027-28. The target session's classes and fee setup must already be in place.
AdminTools.promotionBuildPreviewHint: No student records are changed until you explicitly Apply on the next screen.
AdminTools.promotionRecentDescription: History of previous promotion attempts. Click any run to view its details.
AdminTools.promotionSummaryDescription: Counts derived from per-student decisions. Review carefully before applying.
AdminTools.promotionApplyDescription: Once you apply, every promote/graduate entry is committed. Type APPLY in the box to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionApplyHint: Verify the next-year fee setup is in place. Dues are re-prepared automatically afterwards.
AdminTools.promotionRollbackDescription: Reverses the class/status changes and undoes credit carry-forward. Type ROLLBACK to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionPlanDescription: Review each row. Switch decisions if needed.
AdminTools.sessionHealthDescription: Review each academic year. Missing dues are prepared automatically when Fee Setup is complete.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAutoSyncedBody: Safe missing dues were prepared automatically. Remaining warnings need Fee Setup or database review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAllHealthyBody: Every session has prepared dues and class fee settings.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAttentionBody: Use Fee Setup for class fee gaps. Manual reconcile remains available only as a fallback.
AdminTools.sessionHealthCardAttentionDesc: This session needs a dues or fee setup review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonAutoUnavailable: Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonFailed: Health check could not finish for this session. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.whatsappDescription: Pre-canned message templates with placeholder variables used by the defaulters list and receipt sharing.
AdminTools.whatsappNoticeBody: The app never sends WhatsApp messages on its own. It renders the template with the selected student's data, opens a wa.me link, and lets the staff member review and send manually.
AdminTools.whatsappLibraryDescription: Templates available to staff for defaulter follow-ups and receipt confirmations.
AdminTools.whatsappEmpty: No templates yet. Create one to enable bulk WhatsApp drafts from the defaulters page.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorDescription: Use '{{token}}' placeholders. The app renders these before opening WhatsApp.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorConfirmDelete: Delete template "{name}"? Active drafts will not be affected.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderFatherName: Father's name from the student record.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderDueDate: Oldest due date in DD-MM-YYYY form.

Toasts.balanceClosedFallback: Baaki ko chhoot ke roop mein band kiya.
Toasts.shareLinkCopiedDescription: Parent ko WhatsApp ya SMS se bhejo.
Toasts.shareLinkReadyDescription: Neeche diya URL copy karo aur parent ko bhejo.
Toasts.shareLinkRevokedDescription: Ab parent ise nahi khol payega.
Toasts.copyFailedDescription: URL par lambe time tak press karke khud copy karo.
